moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in full swing, with the second week bringing the quarter-finals, semi-finals, and finals from July 7-12 at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Centre Court calling! Wimbledon is heading into its thrilling second week with the quarter-finals and beyond. Who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's Pimm's and strawberries & cream time! Wimbledon's second week is here, bringing all the iconic traditions and world-class tennis.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: As Wimbledon enters its crucial second week, can any British players make a deep run to the finals? The tension is building!

moments.title: Cardiff Summer Gigs & Road Closures
moments.blurb: Cardiff city centre is set for major summer concerts on Saturday, July 4, with Pitbull at Blackweir Live and Bowling for Soup & Frank Turner at Cardiff Castle, leading to road closures.

angles.name: Cardiff Gig Alert
angles.copy: Cardiff is buzzing this Saturday! Pitbull, Bowling for Soup, and Frank Turner are all playing. Plan your travel – city centre road closures are in effect!

angles.name: Road Closure Heads Up
angles.copy: Hitting Cardiff city centre this Saturday? Expect road closures for major concerts. Give yourself extra time or use public transport! #CardiffTraffic

angles.name: Who are you seeing?
angles.copy: Pitbull, Bowling for Soup, Frank Turner... Cardiff's music scene is HUGE this Saturday! Who's got your ticket?

moments.title: Shane Lynch of Boyzone turns 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone's Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday today, July 3, 2026.

angles.name: Boyzone's Shane at 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to Boyzone's very own Shane Lynch! Still got that 'Love Me For A Reason' charm?

angles.name: 90s Icon Turns 50
angles.copy: Fifty and fabulous! Celebrating Shane Lynch of Boyzone today. What's your favourite Boyzone track?

moments.title: Vince Clarke of Erasure, Yazoo, Depeche Mode turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday today.

angles.name: Synth Legend at 66
angles.copy: Happy 66th birthday to the incredible Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Yazoo and Erasure, his synth magic shaped decades of music. Which era is your favourite?

angles.name: Erasure Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: A Little Respect for Vince Clarke on his 66th birthday! The mastermind behind some of the 80s and 90s biggest synth-pop anthems. What's his best song?

moments.title: Elle King turns 39
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Elle King, famous for 'Ex's & Oh's', turns 39 today, July 3, 2026.

angles.name: Elle King at 39
angles.copy: Happy 39th birthday to the powerhouse Elle King! Still rocking with those 'Ex's & Oh's' vibes? Give us your favourite Elle King track!

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout Elle King
angles.copy: Turning 39 today, it's the one and only Elle King! What's your favourite song from this incredible artist?

moments.title: Taulupe Faletau signs new Cardiff Rugby contract
moments.blurb: Wales and British & Irish Lions legend Taulupe Faletau has signed a new one-year contract with Cardiff Rugby today, July 3, 2026.

angles.name: Faletau Stays at Cardiff
angles.copy: Massive news for Cardiff Rugby fans! Taulupe Faletau has penned a new one-year deal, keeping the Wales legend at the Arms Park. What a boost!

angles.name: Toby is Blue & Black
angles.copy: He's staying! Taulupe Faletau has signed on for another season with Cardiff Rugby. Your thoughts on the big news?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Forecast Next Week
moments.blurb: The UK is bracing for a heatwave next week, with temperatures forecast to reach low 30s°C in the southeast, potentially hitting 40°C in London and the Midlands by July 16-17.

angles.name: Heatwave Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious heat! A UK heatwave is forecast for next week, with temperatures potentially soaring to 40°C in parts of England by mid-July. Stay cool and hydrated!

angles.name: Summer Scorcher
angles.copy: Sun's out, and it's set to get scorching! Next week could see the UK hit 40°C. Time to dig out those fans and factor 50!

moments.title: The Open Championship Build-Up Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale, with practice days and fan events starting from Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The Claret Jug awaits! The build-up to The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins next week with practice days. Who's your pick for Champion Golfer of the Year?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Calling
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! The Open is just around the corner, with the action at Royal Birkdale kicking off with practice days from July 12. Excitement is building!

moments.title: 'Trying' Season 5 on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the heartwarming British comedy 'Trying', starring Esther Smith and Rafe Spall, returns to Apple TV+ on July 8.

angles.name: Trying is Back!
angles.copy: Good news! The lovely couple Nikki and Jason return for season 5 of 'Trying' on Apple TV+ from July 8. Get ready for more laughs and heartfelt moments!

angles.name: Must-Watch Comedy
angles.copy: Need a pick-me-up? 'Trying' Season 5 drops on Apple TV+ next week. It's the perfect blend of British humour and relatable family chaos.

moments.title: 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix
moments.blurb: A brand new adaptation of the beloved 'Little House on the Prairie' book series premieres on Netflix on July 9.

angles.name: Prairie Revival
angles.copy: Get ready to revisit the frontier! A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix July 9. Who's excited for this classic retelling?

angles.name: Family Viewing
angles.copy: Perfect for family viewing! 'Little House on the Prairie' makes its Netflix debut next week. A timeless story for a new generation.

moments.title: The Great Cardiff Feast Returns
moments.blurb: The Great Cardiff Feast takes over Queen Street from July 9-12, offering street food, live music, and family fun with free entry.

angles.name: Cardiff Feast Fun
angles.copy: Foodies rejoice! The Great Cardiff Feast is back on Queen Street from July 9-12. Expect delicious street food, live music, and good vibes!

angles.name: Weekend Plans Cardiff
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? The Great Cardiff Feast kicks off next Thursday with free entry, live music, and incredible food. See you there!

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62

angles.name: Rock Queen at 62

angles.name: Celebrating Courtney
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd birthday to rock legend Courtney Love! An icon of the 90s and beyond.

angles.name: Happy 70th Tom Hanks

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Turning 70 next week, it's the national treasure Tom Hanks! A true cinematic icon. What's the first movie that comes to mind when you think of him?

angles.copy: Celebrating Neil Tennant's 72nd birthday! The lyrical genius behind Pet Shop Boys. What's your top track from the legendary duo?

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Turning 46 on July 10th, it's Jessica Simpson! Reminisce about her biggest hits and reality TV moments with us.

angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Jason Orange, who turns 56 on July 10th! Still 'Back For Good' in our hearts.

moments.title: 'The Dark' premieres on ITV1 & ITVX
moments.blurb: New Scottish Highlands thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly, premieres on ITV1 and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: New Scottish thriller alert! 'The Dark' hits ITV next week, promising a gripping cat-and-mouse chase in the Highlands. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' S2

angles.name: Love is Blind Catch-Up

angles.name: Reality TV Fix
angles.copy: Your next reality TV fix is coming! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' S2 lands on Netflix next week. Who are you hoping to see?
